title: ktag
text: Set KTAG_PATH environment variable define path store log file (ktag.csv). Add ktag class specific inputs want track (see supported types). Note: CSS class defined anywhere won’t apply style. just serve JQuery selector. server side, call record() function: need insert JavaScript code UI side – ’s wrapped record() function: insert JavaScript, log session start, register session end callback, create (single) event listener. FYI – event listener plugged input named ktag_event used anywhere inside app ensure uniqueness.
code: # -- monitor the app in a single call ktag::record()

title: ktag
text: possible disable writing output file setting KTAG_STATE=(probably development environment).

title: motivations
text: used Google Analytics implemented website (’s R/Shiny app), platform feels bit overkill cover limited scope (many views, many reports, many features). Another concern privacy since can’t control collected & tracked. recent update, removed Google tags app wanted quickly replace something monitor basic user actions (navigation, specific buttons links inputs). easiest path replace de gtag CSS class set components ktag one basically reuse JavaScript code send event client Shiny server write CSV file. R/Shiny community provided options cover larger scopes (monitor everything driven approach), wrapping code prototype package cover specific use case describe following parameters: track specific user actions reuse track components based CSS class approach implement app monitoring single call (server side) data loaded session (except single event observer) local save .csv file (append events log)

title: supported-components
text: actionButton actionLink downloadButton downloadLink inputs (example selectInput numericInput), ’s possible set CSS class directly app code. said, may never necessary cover since package address track-everything use case. Instead, may want fire specific direct calls server side using input values values (ex: compute plot filters).

title: supported-components
text: nav_panelktag class automatically added <> elements holding nav-link class.

title: supported-components
text: accordionktag class automatically transformed (moved onto accordion buttons)hold whether accordion panel expanded collapsed.bslib::accordion(class = ‘ktag’, …)

title: supported-components
text: html tags holding ktag CSS class, typically:tags$(id = “my_link”, class = “ktag”, …)

title: R Package for Targeted Shiny Analytics
text: basic CSV file, columns: : id session (default uses session$token) : timestamp action (either JavaScript side R/Shiny server side) : namespace component belongs (module id using Shiny modules) : name action (defined inputId cases) : additional details action
